title: Vizer
description: New strong bosses,weapons and much more!
body:
Hello everyone, it's me, Vizer. I am the creator of this mod. It's my first ever mod, and it was my first experience at coding. I know, not many would see it but I have to write this, so my mind would finally be at peace.

I am currently working on making reforged version of this mod, I am moving this mod out of MCreator, I am gonna make different page where you would be able to download it. The new mod would be called Vizer Reforged (˶˃𐃷˂˶)

What about this mod? I will be no longer updating this mod. Mainly because I lost computer with this mod's file :P

Thank you everyone that downloaded my mod, and wrote comments, it gave me a lot of motivation in the development of this mod. I appreciate every one of you.

Again, thank you everyone, truly❤️

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This mod adds a ton of new content! It adds 5 new mobs,  4 mini bosses and 6 new powerful bosses, as well as new powerful weapons to fight new mobs! Also there are new structures and 4 new bioms and a new dimension!

(P.S Enjoy 3.8.0 <3)

Vizer![Vizer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f71886b7513756659de41dcda151c008ff04cb3c.png)
so it's Vizer and he is really fast and strong good luck

Mod based on corruption so there is corruption that trying to corrupt the overworld and slowly but surely it does, and you must stop it!


![Vizer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e8063badb09f0815924de9e9735a8c9fa6cb2da.png)



![stucture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1432a081ecb2570ffb4c71c6a1e6718409ed9e0.png)

**CREDITS!** - Book called Eternity also same show I took all mobs and bosses from that show. Also I ~~stole~~ used textures from Calamity and Terraria(later I would change them). Also thanks to my friend who helped me with 3d models and structures ALSO DOWNLOAD NEWEST VERSION 3.8.0 NOT 3.0
